items.name: Tiffin Set Kampung
items.description: Our signature three-tier stack. Choose your lauk and we pack it hot.

items.name: Tiffin Set Ayam Berempah
items.description: Crispy spiced fried chicken stacked with rice and sambal.

items.name: Tiffin Set Daging Masak Merah
items.description: Tender beef in rich tomato gravy. A kampung classic.

items.name: Sambal Goreng Tempe
items.description: Crispy tempeh stir-fried in sweet-spicy sambal.

items.name: Paru Goreng Berlada
items.description: Spicy fried beef lungs — a true kampung delicacy.

items.name: Sotong Sambal Petai
items.description: Squid and stink beans in fiery sambal. Not for the faint-hearted.

items.name: Ayam Masak Merah
items.description: Chicken in thick, tangy tomato-chilli gravy.

items.name: Aglio Olio
items.description: Garlic, olive oil, chilli flakes, and parmesan. Simple and addictive.

items.name: Creamy Carbonara
items.description: Rich cream sauce with turkey ham and mushrooms.

items.name: Lamb Chop
items.description: Grilled lamb shoulder with black pepper sauce and mashed potatoes.

items.name: Grilled Steak
items.description: Juicy sirloin with mushroom sauce, coleslaw, and fries.

items.name: Roti Bakar Classic
items.description: Thick toast with butter and kaya. The ultimate midnight snack.

items.name: Roti Bakar Cheese
items.description: Grilled cheese toast with a drizzle of condensed milk.

items.name: Pancake Tembam
items.description: Fluffy thick pancakes with butter and maple syrup.

items.name: Berry Stack Pancake
items.description: Tembam pancakes topped with fresh berries and whipped cream.

items.name: Caramel Latte
items.description: Smooth espresso with caramel and steamed milk.

items.name: Kopi Tarik
items.description: Traditional pulled coffee with condensed milk. Strong and creamy.

items.name: Teh Tarik
items.description: Malaysia's favourite pulled milk tea. Hot or iced.

items.name: Milo Dinosaur
items.description: Iced Milo topped with a mountain of Milo powder.
